title: Domestic water conserving & waste water recycling system
abstract: The present invention relates to a self-contained domestic system for water conservation by unit wise storage and recycling waste water from washbasins, kitchen sink, washing machines and bathrooms through flush system in individual households. The domestic water conserving and waste water recycling system as in Fig. 1 comprises a plurality of domestic waste water generating outlets (1), a domestic waste water bottom storage tank unit (2), a domestic waste water top storage tank unit (3), a motor (4) for pumping the waste water to the top storage tank unit (3), one or more commode flush tanks (5), a water treatment unit (6), one or more wash-basin/ kitchen sink (7), washing machines and bathrooms, wherein the waste water generating outlets (1) are connected to the said top storage tank unit (3) through the motor (4), and the outlets of the said top storage tank unit (3) is connected to a need based water treatment unit (6), the outlet of which is connected to washbasins and flush tanks (5) as well as other water consuming points.
claims: Claims aim: 1. A self-contained domestic water conserving and waste water recycling system comprising, a plurality of domestic waste water generating outlets (1), a domestic waste water bottom storage tank unit (2), domestic waste water top storage tank unit (3), a motor (4), one or more commode flush tank (5), a water treatment unit (6), one or more wash-basin/ kitchen sink (7), washing machines and bathrooms, wherein the waste water generating outlets are connected to the said storage tanks through the motor (4) and the outlets of the said storage tanks are connected to a need based water treatment unit, the outlet of which is connected to washbasins and flush tanks as well as other water consuming points. 2. The self-contained domestic water conserving and waste water recycling system as claimed in claim 1 wherein, the domestic waste water is the waste water generated in-house from bathrooms, toilets, kitchen sink, washing machine. 3. The self-contained domestic water conserving and waste water recycling system as claimed in claim 1 wherein, the domestic waste water bottom storage tank unit (2) is a waste water storage reservoir. 4. The self-contained domestic water conserving and waste water recycling system as claimed in claim 1 wherein, the motor (4) pumps the domestic waste water to the top storage tank unit (3). 5. The self-contained domestic water conserving and waste water recycling system as claimed in claim 1 wherein, the commode flush tank (5) is built- in or affixed on the wall. 6. The self-contained domestic water conserving and waste water recycling system as claimed in claim 1 wherein, the domestic waste water bottom storage tank unit (2) is of customizable shape 7. The self-contained domestic water conserving and waste water recycling system as claimed in claim 1 wherein, the domestic waste water bottom storage tank unit (2) comprises a filtration system positioned before or immediately after the storage tank for collecting elements and large particles and for removing microbes from water. 8. The filtration system as claimed in claim 7 wherein, the filtration system is a coarse filtration, a fine filtration, or both. 9. The self-contained domestic water conserving and waste water recycling system as claimed in claim 1 wherein, the domestic waste water top storage tank unit (3) comprises a water treatment unit (6) to enable the user to get potable water for cooking and drinking purpose.
